title: Get Geolocation
description: Fetch valid regions, districts, and cities for parameter-based tasks

content.introduction: Use this endpoint to fetch valid regions, districts, and cities used in parameter-based tasks for the Google Maps Search Export crawler. This is essential when constructing structured tasks where accurate location inputs are required.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.content:
The value you leave empty determines what the API returns:

- Leave `region` empty to get **regions** for a country
- Provide `region`, leave `city` empty to get **cities** in that region
- Provide `district` to narrow down the city list further

rows.description: Required when querying districts or cities. Leave empty to get regions.
Narrows the city list within a region
Used when retrieving a refined list of locations

proTips.content: Use the returned values for `region`, `district`, and `city` in parameter-based tasks.
Combine location values with `category` to generate accurate search inputs.

seo.title: Get Geolocation - Google Maps Leads Scraper - lobstr.io API
seo.description: Fetch valid regions, districts, and cities for parameter-based Google Maps Search tasks.
